**Which package does this affect?**

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the use case — not just the feature itself.

**Proposed solution**

**Does this require any maintainer-hosted infrastructure?**
If yes, per the Zero-Infra Guarantee this needs to be redesigned to run on
the developer's own infra/CLI before it can be accepted.
